title: Four Point Five Seconds
summary: Chapter 1's monitoring commitment pays off immediately as Ada enters the 4.5-second rupture and the story formally crosses into hard anomaly territory.

narrative.newInfo: Subjective duration and objective instrumentation diverge in a single timestamped event.
narrative.dripHook: What can be verified from the rupture without collapsing into over-interpretation?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Chapter 1 teaser contract is paid: subtle wrongness escalates into measurable event.
narrative.notes: Scene plan (leaning): 1) continuity from Ch1 commitment, 2) rupture event, 3) immediate aftermath specifics, 4) rational containment attempt, 5) evidence alignment in logs, 6) explicit investigation commitment.

rewardTokens.description: Subjective duration and objective time window conflict sharply.
Reader model shifts from teaser anomaly to testable rupture reality.

modelUpdate.before: Pattern suspicion exists but remains deniable.
modelUpdate.shift: A hard timestamped rupture occurs at observational ground zero.
modelUpdate.after: The investigation now requires measurement discipline, not intuition alone.
